text: Implement animator state machine for structured autonomous loop
description: Replace current instruction-based autonomy with explicit state machine. Four states: EXPLORING (find work, break down, ideate), WORKING (push supervised session to complete aim), WRAPPING_UP (verify ~80% complete, commit, reflect, compact), ERROR (exponential backoff on timeouts). Supervisor session prompts itself with state-relevant actions only, responds with JSON, actions executed in supervised session. In-memory state tracking. User can always override (start/stop/manual chat). See packages/wrapped-agents/animator-state-machine-v2.md for complete spec.

status.comment: Core transformation for observable, structured autonomy
